sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vad (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), version FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_vad (id, name, version, created_at) VALUES (1, 'VAD Test A', 1.0, NOW()), (2, 'Sample B', 2.0, NOW()), (3, NULL, 3.0, NOW());
SELECT VAD_INSTALL() ILIKE 'success%' FROM test_vad WHERE version > 1.0;
SELECT id, name FROM test_vad WHERE name ILIKE (SELECT name FROM test_vad WHERE id = 1) OR name ILIKE '%B';
SELECT * FROM test_vad WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_vad) > 1 HAVING COUNT(ILIKE(name, 'Test%')) > 0;
SELECT id, version, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY name ILIKE 'sample%') FROM test_vad WHERE created_at > (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM test_vad) - INTERVAL '1 day';
SELECT id, name ILIKE CONCAT('%', (SELECT name FROM test_vad WHERE id = 2), '%') AS match_name FROM test_vad WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
SELECT VAD_INSTALL() AS install_status WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_vad WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AND name IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE install_history (history_id INT PRIMARY KEY, test_id INT REFERENCES test_vad(id), install_result VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO install_history (history_id, test_id, install_result) VALUES (1, 1, 'success'), (2, 2, 'failure');
SELECT id FROM install_history WHERE install_result ILIKE 's%';
SELECT id, name FROM test_vad WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM install_history WHERE install_history.test_id = test_vad.id) ILIKE '%Test%';
